name: My'engagement' Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sour cream and cream cheese well, then add the beaten egg yolks and other ingredients.
2. Whip the egg whites until stiff and fold in carefully with the cheese and yolk mixture.
3. Pour into a springform pan and bake at 350°F for one hour.
4. Leave the oven door closed for one hour, then open the door slightly for the last five hours (three total).
5. The cake should be creamy and smooth; it may crack on top.
6. Add a strawberry topping if desired.
This cheesecake was given to Jeannie Toll by one of Mort's old girlfriends about 37 years ago when Mort and I told her about our engagement, hence the title. Betty Mondress gave me her recipe card, which I used until it disappeared; Ellen later found my copy of the Levittown Sisterhood Cookbook (circa 1957).
